2605.23992.title: A World Model of Radiologist Reading for Medical Image Representation Learning
2605.23992.paper_summary: Radiologist eye-tracking data provide a rich record of how experts search, compare, and accumulate evidence during image reading; yet, existing methods exploit this signal only partially, either as a static spatial prior or as an auxiliary prediction target decoupled from diagnosis. We propose GazeWorld, a medical imaging world model that treats the image as the world and the radiologist's fixation sequence as a trajectory through it. GazeWorld autoregressively predicts the latent representation of the next fixated patch from all previously visited ones, while a spatial-completion branch covers unvisited regions. At inference, GazeWorld generates a sequence of patch representations from the image alone without requiring real gaze data. Frozen GazeWorld features achieve state-of-the-art diagnostic accuracy across all nine supervised settings on CheXpert, RSNA Pneumonia, and SIIM-ACR Pneumothorax, as well as the highest zero-shot accuracy on all three benchmarks. On the GazeSearch benchmark, a generic decoder trained on the same frozen features outperforms the purpose-built LogitGaze-Med by over 16\% in ScanMatch and 22\% in SED, despite not being explicitly trained to predict gaze. GazeWorld demonstrates that modeling how experts read, not just what they conclude, offers a promising pretraining paradigm for medical imaging AI.
2605.23992.paper_summary_zh: 放射科醫師的眼動追蹤數據提供了專家在影像閱讀過程中如何搜尋、比較和累積證據的豐富記錄；然而，現有的方法僅部分利用這一信號，或者作為靜態空間先驗，或者作為與診斷脫鉤的輔助預測目標。我們提出了GazeWorld，一個醫學影像世界模型，將影像視為世界，並將放射科醫師的注視序列視為穿越其中的軌跡。GazeWorld自回歸地從所有先前訪問的區域預測下一個注視區域的潛在表示，同時一個空間補全分支覆蓋未訪問的區域。在推理時，GazeWorld僅從影像生成一系列區域表示，而無需實際的注視數據。凍結的GazeWorld特徵在CheXpert、RSNA肺炎和SIIM-ACR氣胸的所有九個監督設置中達到了最先進的診斷準確率，並且在所有三個基準上獲得了最高的零-shot準確率。在GazeSearch基準上，基於相同凍結特徵訓練的通用解碼器在ScanMatch中超過了專門構建的LogitGaze-Med超過16\%，在SED中超過22\%，儘管並未明確訓練以預測注視。GazeWorld展示了建模專家如何閱讀，而不僅僅是他們得出的結論，為醫學影像AI提供了一個有前景的預訓練範式。
2605.23992.author: Yiwei Li et.al.
2605.23992.authors: Yiwei Li, Zihao Wu, Huaqin Zhao, Yifan Zhou, Chao Cao, Dajiang Zhu, Tianming Liu, Lin Zhao
